backend/main.mo: Defines the BallPythonTracker actor with all data types, maps, and state for animals and their related event records such as meals, weights, pairings, shed events, tub changes, and clutches.
feature_evidence.json: Provides feature evidence metadata listing feature IDs, descriptions, related frontend files, components, and confidence assessments for recent UI and backend event‑logging changes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries for various frontend files describing their purpose, UI behavior, hooks, and improvements.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point configuring PWA metadata, icons, manifest, and loading the main React script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Defines the PWA manifest including app name, icons, colors, orientation, and capabilities.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing advanced caching, offline support, cache cleanup, and request‑bypass rules for network‑critical routes.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app bootstrapping routing, theming, auth flow, access‑control initialization, and advanced React Query caching with persistence.
frontend/src/components/AccessControlIni: Empty file with no implemented content.
Form dialog for creating a new animal, handling validation, optional image upload, and submission via useAddAnimal.
Placeholder file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/AddMealDialog.ts: Dialog for adding a meal entry to an animal, converting optional datetime to a nanosecond timestamp and submitting via useAddMeal.
frontend/src/components/AddPairingDialog: Dialog for recording a pairing event with optional notes and a date, submitting the entry via useAddPairingEntry.
Dialog to record a new weight entry for an animal, validating input and sending it via useAddWeightEntry.
frontend/src/components/AnimalCard.tsx: Displays an animal's profile, history, and actions, including editing, logging events, and viewing related lists.
frontend/src/components/AnimalList.tsx: Fetches and displays the full animal list with search, heading customization, bulk actions, and water‑change tracking.
frontend/src/components/BootstrapTimeout: Displays a timeout screen with retry and reset actions when app loading is slow.
frontend/src/components/BulkAddAnimalsDi: Dialog for entering multiple new animals at once, including pictures and validation before submitting.
frontend/src/components/BulkAddMealsDial: Dialog to add the same meal entry to multiple selected animals with date and details.
frontend/src/components/BulkAddWeightsDi: Dialog for bulk updating weights for selected animals, each with its own value.
frontend/src/components/ClutchList.tsx: Displays clutch history for an animal with sorting, editing, and deletion options.
frontend/src/components/EditAnimalDialog: Dialog for editing animal details, including picture handling, birthday, weight, and metadata.
frontend/src/components/EditClutchEntryD: Dialog for editing a clutch entry’s date and notes, submitting updates through a mutation.
frontend/src/components/EditMealDialog.t: Dialog for updating a meal’s details, resetting fields on open and submitting via edit mutation.
frontend/src/components/EditPairingDialo: Dialog allowing users to edit a pairing entry’s date and notes and submit changes.
frontend/src/components/EditShedTubChang: Dialog for editing shed and/or tub change entry timestamps, updating one or both via mutations.
frontend/src/components/EditWeightDialog: Dialog to edit a weight entry’s value and date with validation and mutation submission.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary that displays an error UI and offers a page reload on failure.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer showing copyright and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with theme toggle, logout, navigation buttons, and optional user greeting.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login UI using Internet Identity with loading, error handling, and a sign‑in button.
frontend/src/components/MealList.tsx: Displays, edits, and deletes an animal’s meal history with loading skeletons and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Shows a temporary banner when the app goes offline or comes back online.
frontend/src/components/OverviewPage.tsx: Provides a dashboard of animals with summary stats, event timing, and water‑change tracking.
frontend/src/components/PairingList.tsx: Lists, edits, and deletes pairing history entries for an animal with sorted timestamps and dialogs.
frontend/src/components/PrintNameTagsPag: File exists but contains no implementation.
frontend/src/components/PrintSnakeDetail: Generates a printable HTML view of a snake’s details, sorting related records and opening a print window.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Displays a profile setup form allowing users to enter and save their name with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt: Displays a PWA installation prompt using the deferred install event with dismiss and install options.
frontend/src/components/RecordClutchDial: Provides a dialog for recording a clutch event with date and notes, submitting data via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/RoleLoadingRecov: Shows an error and recovery UI for failed role loading with retry and reset options.
frontend/src/components/ShedTubChangeLis: Fetches and displays shed and tub change history, grouping entries by timestamp with edit/delete support.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Empty placeholder component file for the splash screen.
frontend/src/components/WeightList.tsx: Displays sorted weight history with options to edit or delete entries and handles loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on the user’s identity and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated backend actor based on Internet Identity state with readiness and error tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Provides a debounced version of a value with immediate updates for empty strings.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context, handling login, logout, stored identity loading, and status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks that call backend actor methods for user, animal, and settings data with caching and retries.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceWorkerUpdat: Detects service worker updates and triggers activation when available.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base setup defining theme variables, dark mode, safe‑area utilities, and custom breakpoints.
frontend/src/lib/ageCalculator.ts: Calculates age from a nanosecond timestamp and formats it into a human-readable string.
frontend/src/lib/cachePersistence.ts: Utility functions for clearing React Query cache and app-related localStorage keys.
frontend/src/lib/pwaUtils.ts: Provides PWA utility helpers for install detection, storage, connectivity, and service worker status and updates.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL parameters (including hash routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing them from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS theme, color tokens, breakpoints, animations, and plugins for the frontend.
project_state.json: Captures project metadata, architecture notes, and known issues for the Animal Activity Log app.
